title: Plan major-upgrade campaign for remaining moderate findings

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Backlog campaign scope confirmed: major-upgrade track for remaining moderate findings (Next 15 canary -> stable path, Excalidraw advisory path validation, Storybook/Jest ecosystem majors as needed) with compatibility test gates.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Executing remediation-only pass: document unfixable Amplify high/critical chain in Kanbus, then attempt fixes for non-Amplify findings that can be remediated safely.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Blocked high/critical findings are currently all in Amplify dev toolchain transitives (not app runtime): fast-xml-parser/fast-xml-builder/handlebars and related @aws-sdk chains under @aws-amplify/backend + @aws-amplify/backend-cli. Direct deps are already latest in this repo (@aws-amplify/backend 1.22.0, @aws-amplify/backend-cli 1.8.2). npm audit currently proposes only breaking/regressive paths for these. Proceeding to remediate fixable non-Amplify findings now.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Remediation update: moved Next.js from 15.6.0-canary.61 to stable 15.5.18 (with aligned eslint packages), reducing audit from 52->51 (moderate 23->22). Verified prod-only audit has 0 high/critical (3 moderate remaining). Remaining high/critical are still blocked in Amplify dev-toolchain transitives; remaining moderate non-Amplify findings are Excalidraw/nanoid chain where npm audit only proposes breaking downgrade to @excalidraw/excalidraw 0.17.6 (previously caused runtime module errors).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Addressing local run regression: next dev --webpack is no longer supported on the current Next version, causing npm run dev:web to fail immediately. Applying script fix and validating startup.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Checkpoint ready for commit: remediation-only changes include Next migration from 15.6.0 canary to stable 15.5.18 (plus aligned eslint packages) and script compatibility updates for Next CLI flags (dev:web, build:fast). Audit delta: 52 -> 51; no high/critical reduction due upstream Amplify transitive blockers already documented.
